items.title: node-pty installs and the PTY binding loads + spawns
items.expected: node-pty loads; a shell spawns and echoes output (real TTY).
items.evidence: Installed; postinstall restores the darwin spawn-helper bit; spawn printed PTY_RUNS; terminals used in-app all session.

items.title: Create / list / kill terminals
items.expected: create returns {id,projectId,createdAt}; list includes it; kill removes it; missing project → TERMINAL_PROJECT_NOT_FOUND.
items.evidence: TerminalProcessService.test.ts (5 passed); + New / close exercised in-app.

items.title: PTY output streams to a WS client; input reaches the shell
items.expected: Client receives command output; no-terminalId connection rejected.
items.evidence: terminalWebSocket.test.ts (2 passed); live commands run in-app (npm run dev visible in screenshots).

items.title: Scrollback replayed to a late subscriber
items.expected: New subscriber immediately receives buffered scrollback.

items.title: Multiple terminals + reload persistence
items.expected: After reload the terminals (and split layout + names) are restored and reconnect with scrollback.
items.evidence: Verified by the user across the session (multiple terminals, reloads, splits, and renames persisted).

items.title: Resize reflows the terminal (fit addon)
items.expected: Terminal reflows; PTY receives new cols/rows.
items.evidence: FitAddon + ResizeObserver + refit on fonts.ready; terminal renders/fits in-app.

items.title: Server shutdown kills PTYs; no orphans; no PTY output logged
items.expected: PTYs reaped on shutdown; no shell orphans; logs contain no PTY payloads.
items.waiver: bindSignals reaps on SIGINT/SIGTERM (mirrors ClaudeProcessService) and onData never logs payloads — both code-verified. The manual `ps` orphan check was not performed. Accepted for finalization.
items.evidence: Code-verified: signal reaping + no payload logging.
